name: Cuteness Aggression
description:
Griefer has cuteness aggression over you, so he resorts to actually getting a little aggressive.

You take the place of Player in this one. Y'all, I think Blocktales has me in a chokehold right now, I have never been so addicted to a game before. The story, the characters, the MUSIC. And this shit is free to play? I'm gobsmacked.

I don't have anything to say about this one, I really want to tussle with Griefer because I just know he'd be so careful. So uh.

Runs away.

Relax your jaw and your eyebrows. Yeah, you. And stop chewing yourself.
creator: Subconscious
